summary: Adjusted the opening and closing beats to sharpen chapter-boundary contrast while preserving the chapter's existing Mark-session and paired-archive discoveries.
edits: Reframed the opening through Draco noticing Hermione's altered preparation so the chapter enters on character/action rather than another bare anomaly statement.
Recast the final beat to land on the archive's two-person rule, giving the chapter a cleaner handoff into the next chapter's separate room reveal.
